title: Everything You Need to Plan a Group Trip

slides.title: Explore and propose ideas to the group
slides.description: Find activities, restaurants, accommodation and transport directly in the app. Add them to the itinerary or propose them to the group to vote.

slides.title: Decide together with polls
slides.description: Where to stay? What to do? When to leave? Create a poll, everyone votes, the decision is made. The group moves forward, the trip too.

slides.title: A clear itinerary, day by day
slides.description: Each day of the trip is structured: what to do, where to eat, where to sleep, how to get there. Everything is clear for everyone.
